pages.title: One More Breath [Back To Myself]
pages.tagline: Slowed, chopped, and hypnotically woozy for the late-night s

pages.body: This track slows time itself down to a sultry crawl. With vocals pitched low and broken into fragments, you are invited to sit in the quiet space between heartbeats. Heavy sub-bass rumbles beneath spacious swung drums, while detuned synths create a hazy, dreamlike veil over your introspection. It is an auditory exhale for those staring at their reflection after midnight. Let the Latin guitar loops and cello swells wash away the noise of the day. There is no rush here, only the gentle pressure to return within yourself.
pages.styleSentence: At a dramatically slowed tempo of roughly 60 BPM (derived from the measured 123.05), this track features syrupy detuned synths and pitched-down vocal chops gliding over spacious swung 808 drums with heavy sub-bass, creating a thick, hazy southern club atmosphere perfect for late-night car cruises.

pages.text:
[Intro - Soft Female Vocal Sample]
Breathe
One more breath
Come back down

[Slow Breakbeat Enters]
[Dusty drum break]
[Deep warm bass]
[Latin guitar loop]

[Vocal Loop 1]
One more breath
Come back down
One more breath
Slow it down

One more breath
Come back down
One more breath
Slow it down

[Instrumental Break]
[Latin guitar repeats]
[Viola and cello swell]
[Low timpani hit]
[Filtered synth glow]

[Vocal Chop]
Breathe in
Breathe out
Breathe in
Breathe out

[Hook Loop]
I’m coming back
Back to myself
I’m coming back
Back to myself

I’m coming back
Back to myself
One more breath
Nothing else

[Instrumental Drop - Slow and Warm]
[Heavy bass groove]
[Chopped breakbeat drums]
[Cello pulse]
[Latin guitar melody]

[Vocal Texture]
Let it move
Let it fade
Let it move
Let it fade

[Bridge - Whispered]
The room gets quiet
The light gets low
I hear my heartbeat
I let it go

[Final Loop]
One more breath
Come back down
One more breath
Slow it down

Breathe in
Breathe out
Breathe in
Breathe out

[Outro]
I’m coming back
Back to myself
One more breath
Nothing else

members.name: LEAD VOX
members.bio: Whispers that guide you home gently.

members.name: BACKING VOX
members.bio: Layers of harmony filling the quiet room softly.

members.name: DRUMS
members.bio: Keeps the floor shaking without missing a beat.

members.name: PERCUSSION
members.bio: Adds dusty texture to every downbeat rhythmically.

members.name: BASS
members.bio: Anchors the track with deep, heavy weight always.

members.name: SYNTH
members.bio: Paints glowing colors in syrupy detuned hues perfectly.

members.name: TEXTURES
members.bio: Weaves subtle textures through the hazy atmosphere quietly.

members.name: GUITAR
members.bio: Plays warm Latin loops that repeat and soothe.
